name: PRICESMART INC
business: PriceSmart owns and operates U.S.-style membership shopping warehouse clubs in Latin America and the Caribbean, selling high quality merchandise and services at low prices to its Members. The company offers a selection of basic consumable merchandise, fresh foods, hardlines, softlines, food service, and health services, including optical, audiology, and pharmacy.

exposures.sentence: In fiscal year 2025, our digital channel sales reached $306.7 million, a 21.6% increase year-over-year, representing 6.0% of total net merchandise sales.

We are enhancing our distribution and logistics network through the opening of distribution centers in China and in each of our multi-club markets, either operated by PriceSmart or through the use of third-party logistics providers.
We made substantial progress in our migration to the RELEX platform in fiscal year 2025, and we expect to complete our implementation in fiscal year 2026.
Our private-label products that we sell under the Member’s Selection brand plays a crucial role in enhancing the membership value proposition.
Health Services, including optical, audiology and pharmacy, representing approximately 1% of our net merchandise sales.
PriceSmart co-branded credit card which offers an additional cash back incentive for Members with the card.

Any failure by us to maintain the security of the information we hold relating to our Company, Members, employees, and vendors, could damage our reputation with them, disrupt our operations, cause us to incur substantial additional costs, expose us to litigation, and materially affect our operating results.

We currently have unionized employees in three of our markets (Trinidad, Barbados and Panama), and our operations depend on shipping, trucking, ports and other elements of the supply chain that often rely on unionized labor.

catalysts.event: Open sixth warehouse club in La Romana, Dominican Republic
catalysts.sentence: The club will be built on a five-acre property and is anticipated to open in the spring of 2026.

catalysts.event: Open third warehouse club in Montego Bay, Jamaica
catalysts.sentence: The club will be built on a five-acre property and is anticipated to open in the summer of 2026.

catalysts.event: Open fourth warehouse club on South Camp Road, Jamaica
catalysts.sentence: The club will be built on a three-acre property and is anticipated to open in the fall of 2026.
We expect to relocate our Miraflores club to this new location in the first half of calendar year 2027.

catalysts.event: Open PriceSmart-run distribution centers in Trinidad and Dominican Republic
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal year 2026, we plan to open PriceSmart-run distribution centers in Trinidad and Dominican Republic.
We made substantial progress in our migration to the RELEX platform in fiscal year 2025, and we expect to complete our implementation in fiscal year 2026.

catalysts.event: Finalize Elera point-of-sale system implementation in English-speaking markets
catalysts.sentence: during the first quarter of fiscal 2026, we expect to finalize implementing a new point-of-sale system, Elera, a Toshiba product, in all of our English-speaking markets in the Caribbean

catalysts.event: Begin migration of mobile app to native architectures
catalysts.sentence: during fiscal year 2026, we will begin migrating our mobile application to fully native iOS and Android architectures to enhance speed, reliability, and accessibility for our Members.
We anticipate full implementation of our distribution center in China starting in the first quarter of fiscal year 2026.
